name: cross-harness-skills
description: Portable development-process skills for use across Codex, Claude Code, and other harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Portable development skills for agent harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Cross Harness Skills collects portable development-process skills for starting work, crystallizing plans, running delegated code review personas, creating pull requests, cutting releases, and authoring portable skills across Codex, Claude Code, and compatible local harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Use $cross-harness-skills:start-work to begin a development task safely.
Use $cross-harness-skills:code-review to run a delegated multi-persona review.
Use $cross-harness-skills:author-pr to create a ready-for-review PR.
